positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a whimsical crescent moon cradling a cluster of glowing constellations and abstract celestial bodies. The style should be elegant modern Scandinavian design meets Art Deco geometry. Use clean, bold silhouettes and thick linework against a deep navy blue to midnight blue gradient background. The primary colors are gold leaf, creamy white, and vibrant nebula blues, providing high contrast. Composition must be centrally focused and scalable for apparel printing, looking clean and graphic. Highly detailed pattern quality, vector quality, smooth lines, suitable for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, blur, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, messy, cluttered, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, low detail, grayscale, low contrast
